title: deutzia bomiensis
intro: Deutzia bomiensis, also known as the Yunnan deutzia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Hydrangeaceae. It is a shrub native to the mountainous regions of Yunnan Province in China. The medicinal properties of Deutzia bomiensis include its ability to reduce inflammation and fever, as well as its antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Deutzia bomiensis has been used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions, and its herbal preparations include decoctions and infusions that can be used to relieve colds, fever, and respiratory issues.
